allow: Bash(/usr/bin/git commit -m 'Revert quote param from update_carousel_fields; write via update_quote *)
Bash(/usr/bin/git commit -m 'Reduce slide 1 headline font size to ~12px equivalent *)
Bash(/usr/bin/git commit -m 'Quote display and generation improvements *)
Bash(/usr/bin/git commit -m 'Default slide 1 headline font +6px \(3 A+ presses\) *)
Bash(/usr/bin/git commit -m 'Reorder slide 1 controls: quote A-/A+, text A-/A+, bg Up/Down, Fit *)
Bash(/usr/bin/git commit -m 'Quote marks in prompt value but stripped from preview; Edit quote below slide 1 *)
Bash(/usr/bin/git commit -m 'Show quote marks in preview if present in quote field *)
Bash(/usr/bin/git commit -m 'Bump slide 1 text default down 2 sizes \(+6 → +2px\) *)
